initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1997' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
   SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 1.0 / 
   SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) AS growth_rate
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M'
  AND loan.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31';
